hero.description: CVScore helps you turn a pile of CVs into a clear, defensible shortlist — with consistent scoring, transparent criteria, and interview-ready notes for every candidate.

howItWorks.title: From raw CVs to a trusted shortlist
howItWorks.description: Upload PDF résumés, tune what 'great' looks like for this role, and let the engine extract structured data, score candidates, and surface interview-ready shortlists in seconds.

step1.title: Upload your CVs
step1.desc: Drag-and-drop one or many PDF résumés. CVScore normalises layouts, runs OCR if needed, and converts each profile into a consistent internal format.

step2.title: Define what 'great' means
step2.desc: Paste your job description, pick a profile preset, and dial in scoring weights across impact, depth, communication, stability, and more.

step3.title: Rank, compare and brief
step3.desc: Instantly view ranked candidates, compare profiles side-by-side, and generate structured interview guides that keep every conversation consistent.

Footer.description: High-precision neural artifact evaluator for the next generation of hiring. Fair, fast, and data-driven.

AboutDeveloper.title: Built for the Pragmatic Recruiter
AboutDeveloper.description: I'm a software architect passionate about bridging cutting-edge AI with everyday productivity. CVScore PRO was born out of frustration with manual CV screening — designed to be fast, fair, and defensible.
AboutDeveloper.philosophy: "Software should reduce cognitive load, not increase it. If it doesn't solve a problem in 10 seconds, it's not relevant."

Services.title: Career & Recruitment
